who: medical office coordinators in dental offices processing 10–20 appointments/week
offer: For medical office coordinators in dental offices processing 10–20 appointments/week, inconsistent patient follow-up causes missed appointments. We automate recall notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inconsistent patient follow-up leading to missed appointments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical office coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to medical office coordinators with demo video
Join community forums where coordinators share tools
try_it: Let users try appointment history tracking and recall notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Allow CSV import for existing patient data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
